response:
Flaky, blistered, golden crust; zesty, basil-infused, sun-ripened tomato sauce; bubbly, oozy, low-moisture whole-milk mozzarella; charred, sweet cherry tomatoes; crisp, peppery wild arugula; briny, crumbled sheep’s milk feta; crunchy, garlicky sourdough breadcrumbs; earthy, thin-sliced cremini mushrooms; spicy, crumbled Calabrian chiles; silky, grassy extra-virgin olive oil; bright, tangy aged balsamic glaze; fragrant, fresh-cracked black pepper.

(All words are either adjectives [including compound adjectives like *basil-infused*, *thin-sliced*] or nouns [including possessive nouns like *sheep’s* and noun adjuncts like *tomato* (sauce), *sourdough* (breadcrumbs)]; no verbs or adverbs.)
